title: CAP HOUSING SERVICES - 211info
text: CASCADE AIDS PROJECT CAP HOUSING SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides case management to help individuals find housing and related resources. Services include short- and long-term housing search support and one-time emergency rental assistance for security deposits or eviction prevention. 520 NW Davis Street Suite 215 Portland, OR 97209 Eligibility: Individuals living with HIV/AIDS Email (503) 223-5907 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers (503) 223-5907 Main phone Davis Street Office (503) 445-7699 Main phone PRISM Health Main phone (503) 223-5907 FAX (503) 223-6437 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for information or visit website to download housing application form FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None required at intake LANGUAGES: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: Short-term housing: Clackamas, Columbia, Multnomah, Washington, and Yamhill Counties Long-term housing: Multnomah and Washington Counties SITE HOURS: Monday-Thursday 9am-5pm TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: Multiple TriMet MAX and bus lines within the block Services: Eviction Prevention Assistance * AIDS/HIV Housing Search Assistance * AIDS/HIV Issues Rent Payment Assistance * AIDS/HIV Rental Deposit Assistance * AIDS/HIV Tenant Readiness Education Programs * AIDS/HIV Transitional Housing/Shelter * AIDS/HIV Other Services Offered At This Location: HEALTH SCREENING/DIAGNOSTIC SERVICES - TESTING4ALL HEALTH SUPPORTIVE SERVICES - CAMP KC HEALTH SUPPORTIVE SERVICES - PEER-TO-PEER SUPPORT SERVICES INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - DROP IN CENTER If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. CASCADE AIDS PROJECT
